title: Package source explorer and structured API preview in pckg

source.subject: pckg: package source explorer, docs/structured API, BlazorMonaco preview, artifact explorer

body:
## Outcome

Package source explorer, docs/structured API, BlazorMonaco preview, artifact explorer.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `pckg`
- **Commit:** [`52dc7c9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pckg/commit/52dc7c9) — pckg: package source explorer, docs/structured API, BlazorMonaco preview, artifact explorer
